title: Enumeration results in nilpotent algebras
journal: Proceedings of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
We enumerate the number of subalgebras for some classes of finite nilpotent algebras. These classes are: alternative algebras over 

  
    
      G
      F
      (
      q
      )
    
    GF(q)
  

, noncommutative Jordan algebras over 

  
    
      G
      F
      (
      q
      )
    
    GF(q)
  

, algebras with only zero squares over some Dedekind domain.
